text.title: Performance Testing Tools: k6 and Locust Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are baselines defined AND is staging available AND is BASE_URL not prod?

text.example: Team picks k6 (JS) → scaffold k6-load.js from baselines.json (p95<300, p99<500) → BASE_URL points to staging → ci-perf-gate.yml fails PR when p95 > 330 → HTML report uploaded.
